post.description: Refresh JWT access token using the refreshToken HTTP-only cookie set by login or register

patch.description: Update quiz title and boolean settings (required fields and answer visibility). Availability periods are managed via PATCH /quiz/{quizId}/settings/available-periods.
Add, update or remove quiz availability periods

requestBody.description: Updating quiz available periods request body

post.description: Add a question to a quiz

get.description: Get quiz metadata for public execution (no authentication required)
Get a quiz question without the correct answer (no authentication required)

post.description: Evaluate a submitted answer for a quiz question (no authentication required)

requestBody.description: Submitted answer (format depends on question type)

delete.description: Delete a question from a quiz

oneOf.description: For input and single_choise question types
